prose: Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, for the neutral molecule (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The cation (N+1, charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anion (N−1, charge −1, multiplicity 2) were also computed to yield the Fukui functions f⁺ (electrophilic), f⁻ (nucleophilic), and f⁰ (radical). Mulliken charges were used for the Fukui calculation. All three states converged with verified charge conservation: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000 and sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. The most electrophilic site is the α-carbon (C4, atom index 4; f⁺ = 1.924), and the most nucleophilic site is also C4 (f⁻ = 0.162). The reactivity visualization is available in the output directory. The full results are shown in the table above; integrity was confirmed as trustworthy.
